content.en:
"Fortunately, it's a multi-dimensional life of the sixth realm, if it's the seventh realm or some extremely demonic sixth realm multi-dimensional life, maybe my Great Realm armor technique will be useless!"

Ye Tian pondered.

Copying one's body is not a panacea, and if you encounter any danger, it will affect your entire body.

So, you have to be careful in the future.

Now.

Ye Tian sat cross-legged, comprehending the scales on the body of the sixth realm multi-dimensional life, and comprehending the mysteries of the super-dimensional rules above.

"Multi-dimensional wisdom light, turn on!"

"Multi-dimensional treasure mirror, deduction!"

Under the double blessing, Ye Tian's perception of the super-dimensional rules ~ is getting deeper and deeper.

"With such a quick comprehension effect, it's no wonder that the main body of the Extinction Realm is only a single loose cultivator, and without any force as a backer, it can raise the superdimensional rules to the realm of ten thousand realms. -"

However, Ye Tian also knew very well that the Extinction Realm Lord did not have a multi-dimensional wisdom light, even if he practiced the Jiaye Wisdom Body, he would never dare to cast a multi-dimensional wisdom light, and the other party would not dare to use a treasure like the Multi-dimensional Treasure Mirror.

However, Ye Tian has it, so he can raise the extradimensional rules to a higher realm, and he can even come to enlightenment again and again, and he is not afraid to sacrifice the copy body.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian's superdimensional rule realm has continued to improve, but his replica body has also been assimilated more and more seriously, but it is still within the scope of bearing.

7,000 extradimensional rules!

8,000 extradimensional rules!

9000 extradimensional rules!

After three thousand extradimensional eras, Ye Tian finally comprehended the superdimensional rules to the realm of ten thousand realms, and he could continue to comprehend, and the effect was still very good.

So, he continued to meditate, and he didn't care about assimilation at all, and he would not give up this copy body until he could no longer bear it.

If the Extinction Realm Lord knew that Ye Tian had been here for such a long time, he would definitely be extremely surprised.

You must know that the original Extinction Realm Lord entered here many times, and every time he assimilated to a certain extent, he would leave here, and then find a way to ease the assimilation and repair his body.

Only in this way can you enter here again and again and meditate for a long time.

But it is very difficult to solve the problem of assimilation completely.

Even now, the Extinction Realm Lord has spent countless treasures, and there are still a lot of assimilation problems, and he doesn't dare to enter here again, otherwise he will not be able to reverse the assimilation at all.

In the blink of an eye, thousands of extradimensional epochs had passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian's replica body had already had serious problems, and the aura on his body was becoming more and more like that sixth realm multidimensional life, and even his will had to be assimilated.

"I can't hold on anymore, let's let this replica body commit suicide!"

Ye Tianyi's thought caused this replica body to disintegrate and annihilate.

And after such a long period of enlightenment, his extra-dimensional rule realm has reached more than 14,000.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian's second copy body came here again and continued to comprehend the extradimensional rules.

With such a treasure place to quickly improve the extradimensional rules, he naturally had to stay here to comprehend.

Ye Tian was very glad that he had exchanged the third-layer inheritance of the Three Black Secret Method for the information of this treasure land, otherwise where would he have such an opportunity to quickly improve the extradimensional rules!

Time passes.

Ye Tian's duplicate body was scrapped, and he entered here again and again to comprehend the scales of the multi-dimensional life of the sixth realm, and the realm of extra-dimensional rules continued to skyrocket.

Before you know it, an incomparably long time has passed.

After the 30,000 extradimensional era.

Ye Tian had already raised the realm of extradimensional rules to the level of 30,000 Dao, and he had also made great progress in other aspects.

The Three Wu Secret Methods have been cultivated to the third level of the Dacheng realm, the Ka Ye Wisdom Body has also been cultivated to the third level of the Dacheng realm, and the Wumu body and the ten-dimensional celestial body have been cultivated to the third level of the Xiaocheng realm.

The soul will has been slightly improved in the ninth dimension, and he has created another ninth dimensional will mastery, the Sky Tribulation Tower, which is a defensive ninth dimensional will mastery.

It can be said that with Ye Tian's current strength, he almost has the combat power of the seventh day pass.

However, he did not break through the seventh level of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Pagoda.

Because so far, there are only two people who have passed the seventh level of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower, and there may be some fourth realms who have hidden their strength and have not broken into the Heavenly Pass Tower.

But if you really break through the fourth realm of the seventh level of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Pagoda, the number of them will not exceed ten.

Ye Tian had already caused some waves when he had broken through the sixth level of the Ten Dimensional Heaven Pagoda before, but those Fourth Realms didn't know him, they only thought that he was an ancient Fourth Realm, and he had only recently emerged.

But if he broke through the seventh level of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Pagoda, it would be terrible, and it would definitely cause a sensation in all the territories of the Four Thousand Realm, and even attract the attention of the Fifth Realm.

Before his strength was improved to a certain level, he decided to keep a low profile.

If you have the combat power of the ninth level of the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Tower, you may be able to raise your profile a little.

Because according to the relevant information of the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower, the combat power of the eighth day pass is not weaker than the general fifth realm, if you have the combat power of the ninth day pass, it is very good to put it in the fifth realm, and there is no problem with the ability to save your life.

"The super-dimensional rule realm has been raised to thirty thousand, and the scales of the sixth-realm multi-dimensional life have helped me a lot!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Although he could continue to comprehend, even if he comprehended 100,000 extradimensional eras, he would at most raise the extradimensional rules to the realm of 35,000 extradimensional rules.

After all, this Sixth Realm Multi-Dimensional Life Scale is only helpful for him to comprehend the extradimensional rules, and the real use is not this, but only a collateral effect, and he can't expect it to be very effective.

Therefore, if Ye Tian wants to raise the realm of extradimensional rules to a higher realm in the future, he has to find a way to obtain other great opportunities.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian focused on improving his cultivation, cultivating the three innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies, and refining his soul will.

He also tried to create his own supreme mastery, but it was too difficult, and he didn't know how many years it would take to hope for him to create his own supreme mastery.

Time flies.

Another 100,000 extradimensional epochs have passed, and in such a long time, the human race has changed a lot, and many extradimensional realms of the fourth realm have been born, and there are even more extradimensional realms of the third realm.

And the Terrans have become the most terrifying hegemon-level force in the 5000th Territory.

But Ye Tian still didn't let the Terrans enter the Four Thousand Territory, he didn't gain a firm foothold here, and it was undoubtedly not a good thing to let the Terrans come over.

And after such a long period of penance, he had raised the extradimensional rules to more than 35,600.

And on this day, the Ka Ye wisdom body was raised to the limit of the third layer of Dacheng, which is also the limit of the innate multi-dimensional Dao body of the Ka Ye wisdom body, and there is no way to continue to improve the corpse.
